docs.title: Vue gamification todo list app with Vuex, SCSS and TypeScript
docs.text: This application is a todo list with task repetition with level and experience points, and it stores to local storage using vuex-persistedstate.

docs.title: Contents
docs.text: src: Source for Vue, SCSS and TypeScript files. src/components: Vue components to render as HTML with SCSS styles. src/store: Vuex store and store options.

docs.title: Features
docs.text:
• Gamification with levels and experience points (XP)
  • Task repetition for daily, weekly, monthly or yearly tasks
  • Different priorities and difficulties to choose from

docs.title: Build the application to compile and minify the code
Lints code to check for errors and warnings
